title: psychotria deflexa subsp. venulosa
intro: Psychotria deflexa subsp. venulosa, also known as Venulosa, is a subspecies of the Psychotria genus, which is a group of flowering plants in the Rubiaceae family. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Psychotria deflexa subsp. venulosa include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, respiratory issues, and wounds, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are commonly consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
